testcase.name: test_counter_closure_remembers_state
testcase.failure:
../phase_07/tests/test_closures.py:15: in test_counter_closure_remembers_state assert run(src) == "1
2
3
" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in run evaluator.evaluate(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:24: in evaluate self.evaluate(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:56: in evaluate raise Exception(f"Unknown AST node: {type(node)}") E Exception: Unknown AST node: <class 'tinylang.ast.LetStmt'>

testcase.name: test_list_literal_and_print
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:6: in test_list_literal_and_print assert run("print([1, 2, 3]);") == "[1, 2, 3]\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in run evaluator.evaluate(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:24: in evaluate self.evaluate(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:28: in evaluate return self.evaluate(node.expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in evaluate return self.evaluate_call(node) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:127: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate(arg) for arg in node.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:56: in evaluate raise Exception(f"Unknown AST node: {type(node)}") E Exception: Unknown AST node: <class 'tinylang.ast.ListLit'>

testcase.name: test_empty_list
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:10: in test_empty_list assert run("print([]);") == "[]\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in run evaluator.evaluate(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:24: in evaluate self.evaluate(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:28: in evaluate return self.evaluate(node.expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in evaluate return self.evaluate_call(node) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:127: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate(arg) for arg in node.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:56: in evaluate raise Exception(f"Unknown AST node: {type(node)}") E Exception: Unknown AST node: <class 'tinylang.ast.ListLit'>

testcase.name: test_index_read
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:14: in test_index_read assert run("let xs = [10, 20, 30]; print(xs[0], xs[1], xs[2]);") == "10 20 30\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in run evaluator.evaluate(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:24: in evaluate self.evaluate(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:56: in evaluate raise Exception(f"Unknown AST node: {type(node)}") E Exception: Unknown AST node: <class 'tinylang.ast.LetStmt'>

testcase.name: test_index_write
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:28: in test_index_write assert run(src) == "[1, 99, 3]\n" ^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in run evaluator.evaluate(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:24: in evaluate self.evaluate(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:56: in evaluate raise Exception(f"Unknown AST node: {type(node)}") E Exception: Unknown AST node: <class 'tinylang.ast.LetStmt'>

testcase.name: test_len_of_list
testcase.failure: ../phase_08/tests/test_lists.py:32: in test_len_of_list assert run("print(len([1, 2, 3, 4]));") == "4\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:135: in run evaluator.evaluate(program) tinylang/evaluator.py:24: in evaluate self.evaluate(stmt) tinylang/evaluator.py:28: in evaluate return self.evaluate(node.expr) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in evaluate return self.evaluate_call(node) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:127: in evaluate_call args = [self.evaluate(arg) for arg in node.args] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:54: in evaluate return self.evaluate_call(node) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:124: in evaluate_call callee = self.evaluate(node.callee) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:45: in evaluate raise Exception(f"Undefined identifier: {node.name}") E Exception: Undefined identifier: len
